principle: Federated repo lattice. GitHub stores the map; the ecosystem stores the territory.

governance.repo_creation_rule: Create a repo only when doctrine, product, engine, SDK, adapter, registry, or deployment needs independent operational life.
governance.lightweight_rule: No raw HAPI data, secrets, private memory, database dumps, large binaries, live logs, or confidential value records in GitHub.
governance.integration_rule: Every repo must expose doctrine, architecture, schema, security, SEAL policy, registry, tests, and integration surfaces where applicable.

core_repositories.name: ecosystem-architecture
core_repositories.description: Master map for Carbon Actual organizations, repos, doctrines, products, AI, HAPI, pulse, value, governance, and integration lattice.

core_repositories.name: abba-mas
core_repositories.description: ABBA master AI swarm resolver, operating core, registry, model routing, HAPI assignment, and integration command center.

core_repositories.name: actual-value-engine
core_repositories.description: Universal value accounting, token classification, asset-liability inversion, loss recovery, replenishment, and value creation gate.

core_repositories.name: hapi-protocol
core_repositories.description: Human API protocol for HAPI identity, entry, consent, route, SEAL, training, and personal AI assignment.

core_repositories.name: pulse-token-protocol
core_repositories.description: Pulse capture, tokenization, classification, proof routing, return signal, and pulse-to-value lifecycle.

core_repositories.name: io-layer
core_repositories.description: I/O movement layer for PULSE received, VALUE sent, return PULSE, settlement, escrow, value state, and swarm movement.

core_repositories.name: becoming-feed
core_repositories.description: Curated value feed where raw signals are filtered into actionable Becoming values with route, proof need, risk, and expected PULSE.

core_repositories.name: actual-reveal-engine
core_repositories.description: Actual layer for qualified value reveal, public/private boundary, proof approval, and final activation.

core_repositories.name: seal-governance
core_repositories.description: SEAL policy, consent, permission, approval, internal/external gates, review rules, and human authority model.

core_repositories.name: atlas-public
core_repositories.description: Public visibility, public proof, biography, map, opportunity, and approved world-facing knowledge layer.

core_repositories.name: vault-protocol
core_repositories.description: Sensitive proof custody, private records, contract references, treasury references, and protected value records.

core_repositories.name: swarm-registry
core_repositories.description: Registry for product swarms, AI swarms, HAPI swarms, value swarms, tool swarms, proof swarms, and integration swarms.

core_repositories.name: integration-scout
core_repositories.description: Research, test, and gap-finding engine for APIs, SDKs, webhooks, no-code routes, open-source adapters, and partner integration paths.

core_repositories.name: ai-minting-engine
core_repositories.description: AI minting, AI assignment, website/function capsules, personal AI core, permissions, memory references, and SEAL-scoped activation.

core_repositories.name: entity-graph
core_repositories.description: Graph layer for HAPI, products, companies, apps, groups, organizations, tools, roots, values, pulses, and swarms.

core_repositories.name: carbonactual-sdk
core_repositories.description: Developer SDKs, API clients, integration helpers, event helpers, and app adapters for Carbon Actual ecosystem integration.

core_repositories.name: carbonactual-docs
core_repositories.description: Public and internal documentation hub for all Carbon Actual protocols, SDKs, build guides, doctrines, and integration manuals.
